title: Vikrami lighting 3 Premium Reusable Paper Gift Bags Set - Silver & Champagne with 3 Greeting Cards + 6 Tissue Papers, Sturdy Handles, Reinforced Base,Perfect for Birthdays, Weddings, Christmas
features: 【All-In-One Gifting Kit】: Get everything you need for elegant gift-giving in one pack – 3 medium-sized gift bags (1 Silver, 2 Champagne), 3 heartfelt greeting cards, and 6 luxury tissue papers (2 Toffee Grey, 4 Champagne Brown). No extra purchases needed to make your presents stand out!

【Durable & Reusable Design】: Crafted from high-quality thick cardboard, these gift bags feature reinforced cross-bottoms and sturdy handles for long-lasting use. They won’t tear or sag under the weight of books, clothes, stuffed toys, puzzles, or crafts – ideal for repeated gifting or storage.

【Perfect Size for Versatile Use】: Each bag measures 28x20x10cm (11x7.9x3.9 inches) – spacious enough for most gifts, while the 15x60cm tissue papers and 14x9.5cm greeting cards add a polished finish. Fold flat for easy storage when not in use, saving space in your home.

【Elegant Aesthetics for Every Occasion】: The timeless Silver and Champagne colour scheme with subtle letter print fits birthdays, weddings, Christmas, baby showers, Mother’s Day, and more. Whether gifting to friends, family, or colleagues, these bags add a touch of sophistication to any present.

【Hassle-Free Gifting Experience】: Ditch the messy wrapping paper! These ready-to-use bags with pre-included tissue and cards make gift-giving quick and stress-free. Sturdy enough for carrying, stylish enough to impress – perfect for busy Brits who want to give in style.
description: Elevate your gift-giving game with our luxurious 3-piece gift bag set – designed for UK shoppers who value convenience, durability, and elegant presentation! Forget the hassle of fumbling with wrapping paper and tape. Our all-in-one kit has everything you need to create a showstopping gift: three beautifully crafted paper bags in classic Silver and Champagne hues (1 Silver, 2 Champagne), six soft tissue papers (2 Toffee Grey, 4 Champagne Brown) for that premium touch, and three blank greeting cards to pen your heartfelt messages. Crafted with UK gifting needs in mind, these bags are made from thick, high-grade cardboard that’s built to last. The reinforced cross-bottom ensures they stand firm on their own when filling, while the sturdy handles make carrying easy – even for heavier gifts like books or stuffed animals. Best of all, they’re fully reusable, so you can feel good about reducing waste while reusing them for future celebrations or storing household items. At 28x20x10cm, the size is just right for all occasions: birthdays, weddings, Christmas, baby showers, Mother’s Day, or even a thoughtful thank-you gift. The timeless colour palette and subtle letter print add a touch of sophistication without being over-the-top, making them suitable for both casual and formal gifting. Folding flat for storage, these bags won’t clutter your cupboards when not in use. Whether you’re a busy parent, a party planner, or someone who loves to give thoughtful gifts, this set takes the stress out of presentation and lets you focus on the joy of giving. Add a touch of elegance to your next gift – order our reusable gift bag set today and make every present feel special!
